  have h_idx_lt : findIdx p ps < ps.length :=
    findIdx_lt_length_of_exists ⟨L.flatten.length, length_flatten_mem_partialSums_map_length L, by simp; exact h⟩
  have h_idx_pos : 0 < findIdx p ps := by
    by_contra h_z; have := getElem_findIdx h_idx_lt; rw [h_z] at this; simp [getElem_partialSums] at this
  have h_ps_idx := getElem_findIdx h_idx_lt
  have h_ps_j : ps[j] ≤ i := by
    have := findIdx_le (p := p) (i := j); simp at this; omega
  simp [getElem_partialSums, length_flatten, take_map, take_succ hj] at *
  omega

by
  have h_idx := findIdx_lt_length_of_exists (p := (· > i)) (xs := (map length L).partialSums)
    ⟨L.flatten.length, length_flatten_mem_partialSums_map_length L, h⟩
  have h_pos : 0 < (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) := by
    intro h0; have := getElem_findIdx (h := h_idx); simp [h0, getElem_partialSums] at this
  have : (map length L).partialSums[j] ≤ i := by
    simp [j]; apply findIdx_min; omega
  have : i < (map length L).partialSums[j+1] := by
    simp [j, h_pos]; exact getElem_findIdx (h := h_idx)
  simp [getElem_partialSums, length_flatten, hj, take_succ, sum_append] at *
  omega

by
  let S := (map length L).partialSums
  have h_idx : S.findIdx (· > i) = j + 1 := by
    have : S.getElem 0 (by omega) = 0 := by simp [getElem_partialSums]
    omega
  have h_gt : i < S.getElem (j + 1) (by omega) := by
    rw [← h_idx]; apply getElem_findIdx
    exact findIdx_lt_length_of_exists ⟨L.flatten.length, length_flatten_mem_partialSums_map_length L, by simp [h]⟩
  have h_ge : S.getElem j (by omega) ≤ i := by
    rw [← h_idx] at *; simpa using findIdx_min (i := j) (by omega)
  simp [getElem_partialSums, hj, take_succ] at *
  omega

by
  have hS : (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) = j + 1 := by omega
  have h_prop := findIdx_getElem_property (l := (map length L).partialSums) (p := (· > i)) (by
    rw [hS]; apply findIdx_lt_length_of_exists
    exact ⟨L.flatten.length, length_flatten_mem_partialSums_map_length L, h⟩)
  have h_low := not_p_of_lt_findIdx (l := (map length L).partialSums) (p := (· > i)) (i := j) (by
    rw [hS]; exact Nat.lt_add_one j) (by simp; omega)
  have h_step := getElem_succ_scanl (f := (· + ·)) (b := 0) (l := map length L) (i := j) (by simp; omega)
  simp [partialSums, getElem_partialSums, length_flatten, h_step] at h_prop h_low
  omega

by
  have h_idx : (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) = j + 1 := by
    have : (map length L).partialSums[0] = 0 := rfl
    have : (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; have := getElem_findIdx_prop (p := (· > i)) (by simp [hj]); rw [h] at this; simp_all
    omega
  have h_prop := getElem_findIdx_prop (p := (· > i)) (by simp [hj])
  have h_before := before_findIdx (m := j) (p := (· > i)) (l := (map length L).partialSums) (by omega)
  rw [h_idx, getElem_partialSums, take_succ_getElem L j hj, flatten_append, length_append] at h_prop
  simp [k, length_flatten, take_map, getElem_partialSums] at *
  omega
